title: GPU-Fuzz: Finding Memory Errors in Deep Learning Frameworks
authors: Zihao Li, Hongyi Lu, Yanan Guo, Zhenkai Zhang, Shuai Wang, Fengwei Zhang
publish: arXiv
abstract: GPU memory errors are a critical threat to deep learning (DL) frameworks, leading to crashes or even security issues. We introduce GPU-Fuzz, a fuzzer locating these issues efficiently by modeling operator parameters as formal constraints. GPU-Fuzz utilizes a constraint solver to generate test cases that systematically probe error-prone boundary conditions in GPU kernels. Applied to PyTorch, TensorFlow, and PaddlePaddle, we uncovered 13 unknown bugs, demonstrating the effectiveness of GPU-Fuzz in finding memory errors.
title_zh: GPU-Fuzz：在深度学习框架中发现内存错误
abstract_zh: GPU内存错误对深度学习（DL）框架构成严重威胁，可能导致程序崩溃甚至引发安全问题。我们提出了GPU-Fuzz，一种通过将算子参数建模为形式化约束来高效定位此类问题的模糊测试工具。GPU-Fuzz利用约束求解器生成测试用例，系统性地探测GPU内核中易出错的边界条件。在PyTorch、TensorFlow和PaddlePaddle上的应用结果表明，该方法成功发现了13个此前未知的漏洞，验证了GPU-Fuzz在发现内存错误方面的有效性。

title: Consistency Meets Verification: Enhancing Test Generation Quality in Large Language Models Without Ground-Truth Solutions
authors: Hamed Taherkhani, Alireza DaghighFarsoodeh, Mohammad Chowdhury, Hung Viet Pham, Hadi Hemmati
publish: arXiv
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have significantly advanced automated test generation, yet existing methods often rely on ground-truth code for verification, risking bug propagation and limiting applicability in test-driven development. We present ConVerTest, a novel two-stage pipeline for synthesizing reliable tests without requiring prior code implementations. ConVerTest integrates three core strategies: (i) Self-Consistency(SC) to generate convergent test cases via majority voting; (ii) Chain-of-Verification (CoVe) for iterative, reasoning-guided code refinement; and (iii) a Dual Execution Agreement to crossvalidate code and tests through consensus. Experiments on BIGCODEBENCH and LESS BASIC PYTHON PROBLEMS (LBPP) benchmarks demonstrate that ConVerTest improves test validity, line coverage, and mutation scores by up to 39%, 28%, and 18% respectively over baselines. Our findings highlight ConVerTest as a robust solution for mitigating hallucinations and enhancing the reliability of autonomous software testing agents.
title_zh: 一致性与验证相结合：在无需真实答案的情况下提升大语言模型中的测试生成质量
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）在自动化测试生成方面取得了显著进展，但现有方法通常依赖真实代码进行验证，这可能导致缺陷传播，并限制了其在测试驱动开发中的应用。我们提出了ConVerTest，一种新颖的两阶段流程，可在无需预先代码实现的情况下生成可靠的测试。ConVerTest融合了三种核心策略：（i）自一致性（Self-Consistency, SC），通过多数投票生成收敛的测试用例；（ii）验证推理链（Chain-of-Verification, CoVe），实现基于推理的迭代代码优化；（iii）双重执行一致性，通过共识机制对代码与测试进行交叉验证。在BIGCODEBENCH和LESS BASIC PYTHON PROBLEMS（LBPP）基准上的实验表明，与基线方法相比，ConVerTest在测试有效性、行覆盖率和变异得分上分别最高提升了39%、28%和18%。研究结果表明，ConVerTest是一种有效抑制幻觉、提升自主软件测试代理可靠性的强大解决方案。

title: Following Dragons: Code Review-Guided Fuzzing
authors: Viet Hoang Luu, Amirmohammad Pasdar, Wachiraphan Charoenwet, Toby Murray, Shaanan Cohney, Van-Thuan Pham
publish: arXiv
abstract: Modern fuzzers scale to large, real-world software but often fail to exercise the program states developers consider most fragile or security-critical. Such states are typically deep in the execution space, gated by preconditions, or overshadowed by lower-value paths that consume limited fuzzing budgets. Meanwhile, developers routinely surface risk-relevant insights during code review, yet this information is largely ignored by automated testing tools. We present EyeQ, a system that leverages developer intelligence from code reviews to guide fuzzing. EyeQ extracts security-relevant signals from review discussions, localizes the implicated program regions, and translates these insights into annotation-based guidance for fuzzing. The approach operates atop existing annotation-aware fuzzing, requiring no changes to program semantics or developer workflows. We first validate EyeQ through a human-guided feasibility study on a security-focused dataset of PHP code reviews, establishing a strong baseline for review-guided fuzzing. We then automate the workflow using a large language model with carefully designed prompts. EyeQ significantly improves vulnerability discovery over standard fuzzing configurations, uncovering more than 40 previously unknown bugs in the security-critical PHP codebase.
title_zh: 跟随龙：代码审查引导的模糊测试
abstract_zh: 现代模糊测试工具能够扩展到大型真实软件，但往往无法充分测试开发者认为最脆弱或最关键的安全状态。这些状态通常位于执行空间的深层，受到前置条件的限制，或被消耗有限模糊测试资源的低价值路径所掩盖。与此同时，开发者在代码审查过程中经常发现与风险相关的重要信息，但这些信息却大多被自动化测试工具所忽视。本文提出了EyeQ，一种利用代码审查中开发者智慧来指导模糊测试的系统。EyeQ从审查讨论中提取与安全相关的信号，定位受影响的程序区域，并将这些洞察转化为基于注解的模糊测试引导机制。该方法建立在现有的支持注解的模糊测试框架之上，无需更改程序语义或开发者的日常工作流程。我们首先在一个以安全为重点的PHP代码审查数据集上通过人工引导的可行性研究验证了EyeQ的有效性，为基于审查的模糊测试建立了强有力的基线。随后，我们使用经过精心设计提示的大语言模型实现了该流程的自动化。实验结果表明，EyeQ相比标准模糊测试配置显著提升了漏洞发现能力，在关键的PHP代码库中发现了超过40个此前未知的漏洞。

title: Towards Term-based Verification of Diagrammatic Equivalence
authors: Julie Cailler, Noé Delorme, Simon Perdrix, Sophie Tourret
publish: arXiv
abstract: A string diagram is a two-dimensional graphical representation that can be described as a one-dimensional term generated from a set of primitives using sequential and parallel compositions. Since different syntactic terms may represent the same diagram, this syntax is quotiented by a collection of coherence equations expressing equivalence up to deformation. This work lays foundations for automated reasoning about diagrammatic equivalence, motivated primarily by the verification of quantum circuit equivalences. We consider two classes of diagrams, for which we introduce normalizing term rewriting systems that equate diagrammatically equivalent terms. In both cases, we prove termination and confluence with the help of the proof assistant Isabelle/HOL.
title_zh: 面向基于术语的图示等价性验证
abstract_zh: 字符串图是一种二维图形表示法，可被描述为由一组基本元素通过顺序组合和并行组合生成的一维项。由于不同的语法项可能表示同一个图，因此该语法需通过一组相干方程进行商化，以表达在形变等价意义下的等价性。本文旨在为图示等价性的自动化推理奠定基础，主要动机是验证量子电路的等价性。我们考虑了两类图，并为它们引入了可归约的项重写系统，用以判定在图示意义上等价的项。在这两种情况下，我们都借助证明辅助工具 Isabelle/HOL 证明了系统的终止性和合流性。

title: A Weakest Precondition Calculus for Programs and Linear Temporal Specifications
authors: Gidon Ernst
publish: arXiv
abstract: Auto-active program verification rests on the ability to effectively the translation from annotated programs into verification conditions that are then discharged by automated theorem provers in the background. Characteristic such tools, e.g., Why3, Dafny, and Viper, is that this process does not involve user interaction, expecting all guiding hints like invariants to be given upfront. For sequential correctness, this paradigm is well established, thanks to approaches like weakest precondition generation and symbolic execution. However, to capture temporal properties, the specification language of choice for a broader system perspective, additional concerns and challenges are introduced into the translation and proof. Approaches based on symbolic model-checking can verify such properties on system models, e.g., using automata constructions. However, ascribing temporal properties to structured and data-intensive programs is more difficult. Several program calculi have been proposed in the literature, each of which on their own falls short in some regard of supporting an auto-active workflow. However, all essential ideas, while perhaps some are not widely acknowledged, are in fact found in the literature. In this paper, we demonstrate how to assemble these ideas into a weakest-precondition calculus for linear temporal properties and demonstrate it with examples.
title_zh: 用于程序与线性时序规范的最弱前置条件演算
abstract_zh: 自动主动程序验证依赖于将带有注解的程序有效转化为验证条件的能力，这些验证条件随后由后台的自动化定理证明器进行判定。典型的此类工具（例如 Why3、Dafny 和 Viper）的特点是整个过程无需用户交互，要求所有指导性提示（如不变式）都需预先提供。对于顺序正确性而言，由于最弱前置条件生成和符号执行等方法的支持，这一范式已相当成熟。然而，当需要刻画时序性质——这是从更广泛系统视角出发的首选规约语言时，翻译与证明过程便引入了额外的问题与挑战。基于符号模型检测的方法能够利用自动机构造等方式在系统模型上验证这类性质。但将时序性质应用于结构化且数据密集型的程序则更为困难。文献中已提出多种程序演算方法，但每种方法在支持自动主动工作流程的某些方面均存在不足。然而，事实上所有关键思想（尽管其中一些尚未被广泛认知）均已存在于现有文献之中。本文展示了如何将这些思想整合为一种面向线性时序性质的最弱前置条件演算，并通过实例加以说明。

title: DRAMPyML: A Formal Description of DRAM Protocols with Timed Petri Nets
authors: Derek Christ, Thomas Zimmermann, Philippe Barbie, Dmitri Saberi, Yao Yin, Matthias Jung
publish: arXiv
abstract: The JEDEC committee defines various domain-specific DRAM standards. These standards feature increasingly complex and evolving protocol specifications, which are detailed in timing diagrams and command tables. Understanding these protocols is becoming progressively challenging as new features and complex device hierarchies are difficult to comprehend without an expressive model. While each JEDEC standard features a simplified state machine, this state machine fails to reflect the parallel operation of memory banks. In this paper, we present an evolved modeling approach based on timed Petri nets and Python. This model provides a more accurate representation of DRAM protocols, making them easier to understand and directly executable, which enables the evaluation of interesting metrics and the verification of controller RTL models, DRAM logic and memory simulators.
title_zh: DRAMPyML：基于时间Petri网的DRAM协议形式化描述
abstract_zh: JEDEC委员会定义了多种面向特定领域的DRAM标准。这些标准包含日益复杂且不断演进的协议规范，其细节体现在时序图和命令表中。随着新特性的增加以及设备层次结构的复杂化，若缺乏一种具有表达力的建模方法，理解这些协议正变得愈发困难。尽管每个JEDEC标准都提供了一个简化的状态机，但该状态机无法反映内存存储体的并行操作行为。本文提出了一种基于时间Petri网和Python的改进型建模方法。该模型能够更准确地表示DRAM协议，使其更易于理解，并具备直接可执行性，从而支持对关键性能指标的评估，以及对控制器RTL模型、DRAM逻辑和内存模拟器的验证。

title: Reed-Muller Error-Correction Code Encoder for SFQ-to-CMOS Interface Circuits
authors: Yerzhan Mustafa, Berker Peköz, Selçuk Köse
publish: arXiv
abstract: Data transmission from superconducting digital electronics such as single flux quantum (SFQ) logic to semiconductor (CMOS) circuits is subject to bit errors due to, e.g., flux trapping, process parameter variations (PPV), and fabrication defects. In this paper, a lightweight hardware-efficient error-correction code encoder is designed and analyzed. Particularly, a Reed-Muller code RM(1,3) encoder is implemented with SFQ digital logic. The proposed RM(1,3) encoder converts a 4-bit message into an 8-bit codeword and can detect and correct up to 3- and 1-bit errors, respectively. This encoder circuit is designed using MIT-LL SFQ5ee process and SuperTools/ColdFlux RSFQ cell library. A simulation framework integrating JoSIM simulator and MATLAB script for automated data collection and analysis, is proposed to study the performance of RM(1,3) encoder. The proposed encoder improves the probability of having no bit errors by 6.7% as compared to an encoder-less design under $\pm20\%$ PPV. With $\pm15\%$ and lower PPV, the proposed encoder could correct all errors with at least 99.1% probability. The impact of fabrication defects such as open circuit faults on the encoder circuit is also studied using the proposed framework.
title_zh: 用于SFQ到CMOS接口电路的里德-穆勒纠错码编码器
abstract_zh: 由于磁通捕获、工艺参数变化（PPV）以及制造缺陷等原因，从单通量量子（SFQ）逻辑等超导数字电子器件向半导体（CMOS）电路传输数据时容易发生比特错误。本文设计并分析了一种轻量级、硬件高效的纠错码编码器。具体而言，采用SFQ数字逻辑实现了一种Reed-Muller码RM(1,3)编码器。该编码器将4位信息转换为8位码字，最多可检测3位错误并纠正1位错误。编码器电路基于MIT-LL的SFQ5ee工艺以及SuperTools/ColdFlux的RSFQ单元库设计而成。本文提出了一种集成JoSIM仿真器与MATLAB脚本的仿真框架，用于自动化数据采集与分析，以研究RM(1,3)编码器的性能。在±20%的PPV条件下，与无编码器的设计相比，所提出的编码器将无比特错误的概率提高了6.7%。在±15%及更小的PPV条件下，该编码器能够以至少99.1%的概率纠正所有错误。此外，利用所提出的仿真框架还研究了开路故障等制造缺陷对编码器电路性能的影响。

title: Fault Tolerant Design of IGZO-based Binary Search ADCs
authors: Paula Carolina Lozano Duarte, Sule Ozev, Mehdi Tahoori
publish: arXiv
abstract: Thin-film technologies such as Indium Gallium Zinc Oxide (IGZO) enable Flexible Electronics (FE) for emerging applications in wearable sensing, personal health monitoring, and large-area systems. Analog-to-digital converters (ADCs) serve as critical sensor interfaces in these systems. Yet, their vulnerability to manufacturing defects remains poorly understood despite unipolar technologies' inherently high defect densities and process variations compared to mature CMOS technologies. We present a hierarchical fault injection framework to characterize defect sensitivity in Binary Search ADCs implemented in n-type only technologies. Our methodology combines transistor-level defect characterization with system-level fault propagation analysis, enabling efficient exploration of both single and multiple fault scenarios across the conversion hierarchy. The framework identifies critical fault-sensitive circuit components and enables selective redundancy strategies targeting only the most sensitive components. The resulting defect-tolerant designs improve fault coverage from 60% to 92% under single-fault injections and from 34% to 77.6% under multi-fault injection, while incurring only 4.2% area overhead and 6% power increase. While validated on IGZO-TFTs, the methodology applies to all emerging unipolar technologies.
title_zh: 基于IGZO的容错型二进制搜索ADC设计
abstract_zh: 诸如铟镓锌氧化物（IGZO）之类的薄膜技术，为可穿戴传感、个人健康监测和大面积系统等新兴应用中的柔性电子（FE）提供了支持。模数转换器（ADC）在这些系统中作为关键的传感器接口。然而，与成熟的CMOS技术相比，由于单极性技术本身具有较高的缺陷密度和工艺波动性，其对制造缺陷的敏感性仍缺乏深入理解。本文提出了一种分层故障注入框架，用于表征仅使用n型器件技术实现的二进制搜索ADC中的缺陷敏感性。我们的方法结合了晶体管级缺陷表征与系统级故障传播分析，能够高效地探索转换过程中单个及多个故障场景。该框架可识别出对故障敏感的关键电路组件，并支持仅针对最敏感组件的有选择性冗余策略。由此实现的容错设计在单故障注入下将故障覆盖率从60%提升至92%，在多故障注入下从34%提升至77.6%，同时仅带来4.2%的面积开销和6%的功耗增加。尽管本方法在IGZO薄膜晶体管上进行了验证，但其适用于所有新兴的单极性技术。

title: TestExplora: Benchmarking LLMs for Proactive Bug Discovery via Repository-Level Test Generation
authors: Steven Liu, Jane Luo, Xin Zhang, Aofan Liu, Hao Liu, Jie Wu, Ziyang Huang, Yangyu Huang, Yu Kang, Scarlett Li
publish: arXiv
abstract: Given that Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to automate software development, comprehensive software assurance spans three distinct goals: regression prevention, reactive reproduction, and proactive discovery. Current evaluations systematically overlook the third goal. Specifically, they either treat existing code as ground truth (a compliance trap) for regression prevention, or depend on post-failure artifacts (e.g., issue reports) for bug reproduction-so they rarely surface defects before failures. To bridge this gap, we present TestExplora, a benchmark designed to evaluate LLMs as proactive testers within full-scale, realistic repository environments. TestExplora contains 2,389 tasks from 482 repositories and hides all defect-related signals. Models must proactively find bugs by comparing implementations against documentation-derived intent, using documentation as the oracle. Furthermore, to keep evaluation sustainable and reduce leakage, we propose continuous, time-aware data collection. Our evaluation reveals a significant capability gap: state-of-the-art models achieve a maximum Fail-to-Pass (F2P) rate of only 16.06%. Further analysis indicates that navigating complex cross-module interactions and leveraging agentic exploration are critical to advancing LLMs toward autonomous software quality assurance. Consistent with this, SWEAgent instantiated with GPT-5-mini achieves an F2P of 17.27% and an F2P@5 of 29.7%, highlighting the effectiveness and promise of agentic exploration in proactive bug discovery tasks.
title_zh: TestExplora：通过仓库级测试生成对大语言模型进行主动发现缺陷的基准测试
abstract_zh: 鉴于大语言模型（LLM）正越来越多地被应用于自动化软件开发，全面的软件保障涵盖三个明确的目标：回归预防、被动复现和主动发现。然而，当前的评估体系系统性地忽略了第三个目标。具体而言，现有方法要么将现有代码视为真实标准（即“合规性陷阱”），用于回归预防；要么依赖故障后的产物（如问题报告）来复现缺陷，因此极少能在故障发生前发现潜在问题。为填补这一空白，我们提出了TestExplora——一个旨在评估LLM在大规模、真实代码仓库环境中作为主动测试者能力的基准。TestExplora包含来自482个仓库的2,389项任务，并完全隐藏了所有与缺陷相关的提示信息。模型必须通过将代码实现与从文档推导出的意图进行对比，以文档作为判断正确性的“预言器”，主动发现漏洞。此外，为了确保评估的可持续性并减少数据泄露，我们提出了持续性、时间感知的数据收集方法。我们的评估揭示了一个显著的能力差距：最先进的模型在“失败到通过”（Fail-to-Pass, F2P）指标上的最高表现仅为16.06%。进一步分析表明，处理复杂的跨模块交互以及采用基于智能体的探索策略，对于推动LLM实现自主软件质量保障至关重要。与此一致的是，基于GPT-5-mini实例化的SWEAgent实现了17.27%的F2P和29.7%的F2P@5，凸显了智能体式探索在主动发现缺陷任务中的有效性与潜力。

title: A High-Performance Hybrid Division Algorithm: Combining Additive Iteration, Multiplicative Lookup, and Precision Compensation on FPGA
authors: Runyang Liu, Guodong Wang, Zhuoao Li, Yunhao Ma, Lei Chen, Fengwei An
publish: 2025 5th International Conference on Electron Devices and Applications (ICEDA)
abstract: This paper introduces a novel hybrid division algorithm that synergistically integrates additive normalization with multiplicative normalization techniques to overcome limitations in traditional approaches. The core innovation replaces complex Quotient Digit Selection (QDS) tables with a compact reciprocal lookup table generated via first-order series expansion (requiring only one DSP), while a precision compensation mechanism dynamically corrects approximation errors. We present a highly optimized FPGA implementation featuring a multiplexed pipelined architecture that maximizes resource reuse and supports configurable precision parameters. Experimental results on Xilinx Artix-7 FPGAs demonstrate significant improvements: 64% fewer LUTs vs. state-of-the-art designs [1], 76 % fewer DSPs vs. Xilinx Vivado IP, and superior latency-frequency tradeoffs (64-bit division in 21 cycles at 188 MHz). Functional verification confirms algorithmic correctness, establishing our solution as a resource-efficient, high-performance approach for fixed-point arithmetic in compute-intensive applications.
title_zh: 一种高性能混合除法算法：在FPGA上结合加法迭代、乘法查表与精度补偿
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的混合除法算法，该算法协同结合了加法归一化与乘法归一化技术，以克服传统方法的局限性。其核心创新在于，用一个通过一阶级数展开生成的紧凑型倒数查找表（仅需一个DSP）取代了复杂的商数位选择（QDS）查找表，同时引入一种精度补偿机制，可动态校正近似误差。我们设计了一种高度优化的FPGA实现方案，采用多路复用流水线架构，最大限度地实现资源复用，并支持可配置的精度参数。在Xilinx Artix-7 FPGA上的实验结果表明，该方案性能显著提升：与现有最先进设计相比，LUT资源减少64%；与Xilinx Vivado IP相比，DSP资源减少76%；同时在延迟与频率的权衡上表现更优（在188 MHz下，64位除法仅需21个时钟周期）。功能验证确认了算法的正确性，证明本方案是一种适用于计算密集型应用中定点运算的高效、高性能解决方案。

title: SHAFI: Securing Hash-Based Post-Quantum Cryptography from Hardware Fault Injection Attacks
authors: Yanze Wu, Qian Wang, Md Tanvir Arafin
publish: 2025 Asian Hardware Oriented Security and Trust Symposium (AsianHOST)
abstract: SPHINCS+ has emerged as a hash-based scheme to win the National Institute of Standards and Technology’s (NIST) post-quantum cryptography (PQC) standardization competition. Unfortunately, recent research has demonstrated that fault injection (FI) attacks on SPHINCS+ can significantly compromise the security of the signing process. This paper introduces SHAFI, a countermeasure to FI attacks on SPHINCS+, that protects the signature generation and verification process via address masking. Experiments on a standard fault injection platform, ChipWhisperer, demonstrate that the proposed method renders faulty signatures unanalyzable by an attacker, eliminating the possibility of universal forgery attempts. This proposed technique is simple, memory and computation budget efficient, and applicable to virtually any SPHINCS+-derived hash-based signing technique. The code and experiment artifacts for the fault injection experiment and the countermeasure are published at https://github.com/SPIRE-GMU/SPHINCS-Chipwhisperer
title_zh: SHAFI：保护基于哈希的后量子密码学免受硬件故障注入攻击
abstract_zh: SPHINCS+ 作为一种基于哈希的签名方案，已成为美国国家标准与技术研究院（NIST）后量子密码学（PQC）标准化竞赛的胜出者。然而，近期研究表明，对 SPHINCS+ 实施故障注入（FI）攻击可显著破坏其签名过程的安全性。本文提出了一种名为 SHAFI 的防御机制，用于抵御针对 SPHINCS+ 的故障注入攻击，该机制通过地址掩码技术保护签名生成与验证过程。在标准故障注入平台 ChipWhisperer 上的实验表明，所提出的方法使得攻击者无法分析产生的错误签名，从而消除了通用伪造攻击的可能性。该技术简单高效，内存和计算开销小，且几乎适用于所有基于 SPHINCS+ 的哈希签名方法。故障注入实验及防御措施的代码和实验资料已公开发布于 https://github.com/SPIRE-GMU/SPHINCS-Chipwhisperer

title: Blockchain-PUF Fusion for Privacy-Preserving Authentication against AI-enabled Attacks in Consumer IoT Systems
authors: Weiyu Wang, Keping Yu, Weizheng Wang, Chunhua Su, Osama Alfarraj
publish: IEEE Transactions on Consumer Electronics
abstract: The Internet of Things (IoT) has transformed consumer devices by connecting smart home appliances, wearable health monitors, and personal devices that gather and share data. Cloud-assisted consumer IoT enhances these networks with improved data processing and storage capabilities for real-time analytics and personalized services. However, this open communication exposes consumer devices to risks including data leakage, eavesdropping, and tracking by malicious actors who increasingly employ AI-enabled attack techniques such as intelligent phishing and automated vulnerability exploitation. To address these challenges, we propose a lightweight authentication protocol for resource-constrained consumer IoT devices using bitwise operations and hash functions. We incorporate Physical Unclonable Functions (PUFs) and blockchain-based smart contracts to enhance security and efficiency while defending against AI-powered hardware attacks. PUFs provide unique device fingerprints resistant to AI-based cloning attacks, while smart contracts secure transactions and detect AI-generated fraudulent attempts. Security evaluation through formal verification demonstrates that our scheme offers stronger protection for consumer devices against both traditional and AI-enabled threats while maintaining lower computational and communication costs compared to existing solutions.
title_zh: 区块链与PUF融合用于抵御消费物联网系统中AI赋能攻击的隐私保护认证
abstract_zh: 物联网（IoT）通过连接智能家居设备、可穿戴健康监测器以及收集和共享数据的个人设备，彻底改变了消费类电子产品。基于云计算的消费物联网通过增强的数据处理和存储能力，支持实时分析和个性化服务，进一步扩展了这些网络的功能。然而，这种开放的通信方式也使消费设备面临数据泄露、窃听和被恶意行为者追踪等风险，而这些攻击者正越来越多地采用人工智能（AI）驱动的攻击技术，例如智能钓鱼攻击和自动化漏洞利用。为应对这些挑战，本文提出了一种轻量级认证协议，适用于资源受限的消费物联网设备，该协议采用位运算和哈希函数实现。我们引入物理不可克隆函数（PUF）和基于区块链的智能合约，以提升安全性与效率，并有效防御AI驱动的硬件攻击。PUF为设备提供唯一的“指纹”，能够抵抗基于AI的克隆攻击；而智能合约则保障交易安全，并识别由AI生成的欺诈行为。通过形式化验证的安全性评估表明，与现有方案相比，本方案在提供更强防护能力以抵御传统及AI赋能威胁的同时，保持了更低的计算和通信开销。

title: No HDL, No Problem: HLS-Generated Power Wasters for Fault Injection in Cloud FPGAs
authors: Zeynep Gülbeyaz Demirdag, Hassan Nassar, Lars Bauer, Jörg Henkel
publish: IEEE Embedded Systems Letters
abstract: Power wasters are a critical threat to cloud FPGAs. They induce voltage drops that lead to timing faults or complete denial of service. Previous methods for generating power wasters rely on low-level RTL modifications, including primitive-level structures and constraint manipulation. However, newer FPGA platforms such as Xilinx Versal restrict access to such low-level features, preventing traditional attack methods. In this work, we are the first to show that power wasters can still be created using only High-Level Synthesis (HLS), which is a standard development flow for cloud FPGAs. We demonstrate HLS-generated power wasters that can inject faults or crash the FPGA by applying overclocking and selected input patterns.
title_zh: 没有HDL，也没问题：用于云FPGA故障注入的HLS生成的功耗浪费器
abstract_zh: 功耗浪费器（Power wasters）对云FPGA构成严重威胁，它们会引发电压下降，导致时序故障甚至完全的服务拒绝。以往生成功耗浪费器的方法依赖于低级RTL（寄存器传输级）修改，包括原语级结构和约束操纵。然而，Xilinx Versal等新型FPGA平台限制了对这些低级特性的访问，从而阻止了传统攻击方法的实施。在本研究中，我们首次证明，仅使用高层次综合（HLS）——云FPGA的标准开发流程——仍然可以创建功耗浪费器。我们展示了通过超频和选择特定输入模式，由HLS生成的功耗浪费器能够注入故障或导致FPGA崩溃。

title: A Hierarchical Combined Fault Injection-Based Resilience Evaluation Method for Heterogeneous Power Terminals
authors: Xu Dong, Tianle Yao, Jiaming Liu, Jiakai Hao, Xianzhou Gao, Ruxia Yang
publish: 2025 15th International Conference on Power and Energy Systems (ICPES)
abstract: The rapid development of distributed energy systems and smart grids has led to the large-scale deployment and heterogenization of terminal devices, increasing the vulnerability of power systems to user-level software failures, network anomalies, and cross-layer cascading faults. Considering that existing evaluation methods fail to simultaneously simulate multi-layer and multi-type anomalies while quantifying terminal resilience, this paper proposes a resilience evaluation method based on hierarchical combined fault injection. The proposed method constructs a multi-layer injection framework covering the hardware, system, and application layers, and designs a two-level indicator system composed of diagnostic accuracy (DA), detection delay (DD), resource overhead (RO), service recovery time (SRT), and resilience index (RI). Single and combined fault injection experiments are conducted on Raspberry Pi, x86-based industrial PCs, and QEMU virtual nodes. The results show that SRT, DD, and RO are key factors influencing RI; resilience significantly decreases under combined fault scenarios, and resource-constrained terminals exhibit the highest vulnerability during cascading failures. These findings demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method in characterizing complex fault response and recovery behaviors of heterogeneous terminals, providing a quantitative basis for terminal selection and resilience optimization strategies.
title_zh: 一种基于分层组合故障注入的异构电力终端韧性评估方法
abstract_zh: 分布式能源系统与智能电网的快速发展导致了终端设备的大规模部署和异构化，增加了电力系统在用户级软件故障、网络异常以及跨层级联故障方面的脆弱性。考虑到现有评估方法难以同时模拟多层级、多类型的异常并量化终端的韧性，本文提出了一种基于分层组合故障注入的韧性评估方法。该方法构建了覆盖硬件层、系统层和应用层的多层注入框架，并设计了由诊断准确率（DA）、检测延迟（DD）、资源开销（RO）、服务恢复时间（SRT）和韧性指数（RI）组成的两级指标体系。在树莓派、基于x86架构的工业计算机以及QEMU虚拟节点上开展了单一及组合故障注入实验。结果表明，SRT、DD和RO是影响RI的关键因素；在组合故障场景下，系统韧性显著下降；而在级联故障过程中，资源受限的终端表现出最高的脆弱性。研究结果验证了所提方法在刻画异构终端复杂故障响应与恢复行为方面的有效性，为终端设备选型及韧性优化策略提供了量化依据。

title:
Bug Hunting in the RISC-V SoC: The 1
                    <sup>st</sup>
                    Integrated Circuit Security Challenge
authors: Lei Peng, Jiacheng Zhu, Qizhi Zhang, Shibo Tang, Xingxin Wang, Xinyu Zheng, Yaxuan Zhao, Aijiao Cui, Wei Hu, Jiaji He, Peng Fei Qiu
publish: 2025 Asian Hardware Oriented Security and Trust Symposium (AsianHOST)
abstract: Hardware security vulnerabilities pose a critical threat to modern system-on-chip (SoC) designs, yet their detection remains challenging due to low-level semantics and limited runtime observability. To address this gap, we organized the 1st Integrated Circuit Security Challenge (ICSC) in 2024, leveraging the open-source OpenPiton SoC platform. We introduced SecRisBen, a novel benchmark suite featuring realistic Register Transfer Level (RTL)-vulnerabilities systematically injected into the processor core and peripheral modules using five structured strategies. A multidimensional evaluation framework was developed to rigorously assess competing analysis tools. Two leading teams demonstrated state-of-the-art detection capabilities, employing information flow-based formal verification and semantic-driven property generation to uncover multiple high-impact vulnerabilities. The challenge successfully fostered collaboration and advancement in hardware security tools. Building on this momentum, we plan to hold subsequent competitions to further accelerate the progress in hardware security research and tool development.
title_zh: RISC-V SoC 中的漏洞挖掘：第一届集成电路安全挑战赛
abstract_zh: 硬件安全漏洞对现代片上系统（SoC）设计构成了严重威胁，但由于其底层语义复杂且运行时可观测性有限，漏洞检测仍然充满挑战。为弥补这一空白，我们于2024年组织了首届集成电路安全挑战赛（ICSC），采用开源的OpenPiton SoC平台作为基础。我们提出了SecRisBen——一种新颖的基准测试套件，通过五种结构化策略，系统性地在处理器核心和外围模块中注入了具有真实性的寄存器传输级（RTL）漏洞。同时，我们开发了一个多维度评估框架，用于严格评估参赛分析工具的性能。两支领先团队展示了当前最先进的检测能力，分别采用基于信息流的形式化验证和语义驱动的属性生成技术，成功发现了多个高危漏洞。本次挑战赛有效促进了硬件安全领域的协作与技术进步。在此基础上，我们计划持续举办后续竞赛，进一步推动硬件安全研究及工具开发的快速发展。

title: An Auto-profiling Side-Channel Attack against NTT Hardware Implementations
authors: Yiting Wang, Zelin Lu, Gang Qu, Md Tanvir Arafin
publish: 2025 Asian Hardware Oriented Security and Trust Symposium (AsianHOST)
abstract: Due to its effectiveness and efficient implementation, lattice-based cryptography becomes a leading solution to quantum computing attacks. However, many successful side-channel attacks (SCA) against lattice-based post-quantum cryptography (PQC) have demonstrated their security vulnerabilities. Number Theoretic Transform (NTT) is the basic sub-block in latticebased cryptography and a common target for SCA. Unlike the heavy investment on NTT software implementation against SCA, there is little reported study of its hardware implementation. In this paper, we propose an unsupervised learning-based belief propagation attack to break the NTT operation by leveraging power leakages captured from NTT hardware implementations (on Xilinx Artix-7). Our attack only requires the collection of 5000 power traces for profiling and the building of four templates. Based on this, we are able to apply belief propagation with only 20 power traces to reveal half of the input of a 256 -point NTT. This allows the retrieval of the secret coefficients in lattice-based cryptographic protocols.
title_zh: 针对NTT硬件实现的自动分析型侧信道攻击
abstract_zh: 由于其高效性和高效的实现方式，基于格的密码学已成为应对量子计算攻击的主要解决方案。然而，许多针对基于格的后量子密码学（PQC）成功的侧信道攻击（SCA）已暴露了其安全漏洞。数论变换（NTT）是基于格密码学中的基本子模块，也是SCA的常见攻击目标。与在软件实现方面针对NTT的大量研究投入不同，目前关于其硬件实现的公开研究甚少。本文提出了一种基于无监督学习的置信传播攻击方法，利用从NTT硬件实现（在Xilinx Artix-7上）采集的功耗泄露信息来破解NTT运算。我们的攻击仅需采集5000条功耗轨迹用于特征分析，并构建四个模板。在此基础上，仅需20条功耗轨迹即可通过置信传播方法恢复256点NTT一半的输入数据，从而进一步推导出基于格密码协议中的秘密系数。

title: Efficient Regression-Based Verification Methodology for Hardware-in-the-Loop Simulation Models
authors: David Schlatzer, Nick Schade, Jürgen Pannek
publish: 2025 IEEE International Conference on Vehicular Electronics and Safety (ICVES)
abstract: Hardware-in-the-Loop (HiL) simulation is a well-established technique for system validation in automotive development. As autonomous vehicles become more prevalent, the ability to demonstrate the credibility of these HiL systems becomes increasingly important. A key factor influencing this credibility is the verification of the simulation models used as a subsystem within the HiL environment. The increasing complexity of vehicle software leads to more complex simulation models, which in turn significantly raises the effort required for their verification. At the same time, with the shift towards software-defined vehicles, the demand for faster and more frequent incremental software updates is growing. This trend presents a substantial challenge for providers of HiL simulation models, who must keep pace without impairing the ability to demonstrate and document the credibility of the simulation models for every release. In this context, regression testing plays a crucial role in incremental development processes of simulation models, as it ensures that newly introduced changes do not negatively impact existing system behavior. To address this, this paper introduces a regression-based test case selection method to increase the efficiency of the verification of HiL simulation models. The approach performs graph-based signal flow analysis, identifies differences between consecutive simulation model releases, and selects reusable vehicle-level test cases for regression testing of a new simulation model increment.
title_zh: 基于回归的硬件在环仿真模型高效验证方法
abstract_zh: 硬件在环（HiL）仿真技术在汽车开发中的系统验证方面已得到广泛应用。随着自动驾驶车辆日益普及，证明这些HiL系统可信度的重要性也日益凸显。影响可信度的一个关键因素，是HiL环境中作为子系统的仿真模型本身的验证。车辆软件复杂性的不断提升，导致仿真模型也愈发复杂，从而显著增加了模型验证所需的工作量。与此同时，随着向软件定义汽车的转变，对更快速、更频繁的增量软件更新的需求不断增长。这一趋势给HiL仿真模型提供商带来了巨大挑战：他们必须在不损害每次发布版本的仿真模型可信度证明与文档化能力的前提下，跟上更新节奏。在此背景下，回归测试在仿真模型的增量开发过程中发挥着至关重要的作用，因为它能够确保新引入的变更不会对现有系统行为产生负面影响。为应对这一挑战，本文提出了一种基于回归的测试用例选择方法，以提高HiL仿真模型验证的效率。该方法通过基于图的信号流分析，识别连续仿真模型版本之间的差异，并选择可复用的整车级测试用例，用于新仿真模型增量的回归测试。

title: A Portable and Hybrid Verification Framework Using C and UVM for Secure RISC-V SoCs
authors: Muhammad Yasir Farooq, Haroon Waris, Chenghua Wang, Muhammad Usman Akram, Jiatong Tian, Jiang Li, Weiqiang Liu
publish: 2025 Asian Hardware Oriented Security and Trust Symposium (AsianHOST)
abstract: Comprehensive functional verification at the System-on-Chip (SoC) level is a critical and time-consuming task. The growing adoption of open source RISC-V based cores with safety and security features has introduced new verification challenges that require scalable and reusable solutions. This paper presents a portable and hybrid verification framework using C and UVM for secure RISC-V SoCs. The proposed UVM based verification framework is designed to support both C/assembly level test cases and SystemVerilog based verification components, enabling a dual test strategy that enhances coverage and debugging capabilities. The VE includes verification components for core, cache and peripheral interfaces such as agents, predictors and scoreboards, making it applicable to a wide range of RISC-V standard extension cores. It also supports third-party VIP integration, regression analysis and functional coverage tracking for integer, multiplication, compressed and floating-point instruction sets of RISC-V core. As a case study, the framework is applied to a customized open source RISCV SoC enhanced with AES security features. The experimental results demonstrate that the framework achieves 90% functional coverage, 85% code coverage and 91% instruction coverage. The indigenously developed hybrid C/UVM test suites for UART, SPI and AES are easily configurable and reusable. In general, the proposed framework provides an automated, portable and extensible solution to verify secure RISC-V SoCs with reduced engineering effort and faster coverage closure. This work emphasizes practical integration of hybrid C/UVM testing across RISCV cores and peripherals and includes a comparative evaluation with existing platforms to highlight portability and reuse.
title_zh: 一种用于安全RISC-V片上系统的基于C语言和UVM的便携式混合验证框架
abstract_zh: 在芯片级系统（SoC）层面进行全面的功能验证是一项关键且耗时的任务。随着具备安全与安保特性的开源RISC-V处理器核日益普及，验证工作面临新的挑战，亟需可扩展且可复用的解决方案。本文提出了一种基于C语言和UVM（通用验证方法学）的可移植混合验证框架，用于安全RISC-V SoC的验证。该基于UVM的验证框架支持C/汇编级测试用例以及SystemVerilog验证组件，实现了双测试策略，从而提升了覆盖率和调试能力。该验证环境（VE）包含针对处理器核、缓存及外设接口（如代理、预测器和记分板）的验证组件，适用于多种RISC-V标准扩展指令集的处理器核。同时，该框架支持第三方VIP集成、回归分析以及对RISC-V处理器核的整数、乘法、压缩和浮点指令集的功能覆盖率追踪。作为案例研究，该框架被应用于一个集成了AES安全特性的定制化开源RISC-V SoC。实验结果表明，该框架实现了90%的功能覆盖率、85%的代码覆盖率以及91%的指令覆盖率。自主开发的针对UART、SPI和AES的混合C/UVM测试套件具有良好的可配置性和可复用性。总体而言，所提出的框架为安全RISC-V SoC的验证提供了一种自动化、可移植且可扩展的解决方案，显著降低了工程投入并加快了覆盖率收敛速度。本研究强调了混合C/UVM测试在RISC-V处理器核与外设中的实际集成应用，并通过与现有平台的对比评估，突出了该框架在可移植性和可复用性方面的优势。

title: GNΩSIS: Lessons Learned in Generating a High-Level Synthesis Dataset
authors: Aggelos Ferikoglou, Despoina Tomkou, Dimosthenis Masouros, Dimitrios Soudris, Sotirios Xydis
publish: ACM Transactions on Architecture and Code Optimization
abstract: None
title_zh: GNΩSIS：生成高层次综合数据集的经验教训
abstract_zh: None

title: Variation-Tolerant Circuit Design and Online Learning Framework for Memristor-Based Trace-STDP SNN
authors: Yi Zheng, Yuhan He, Ruisi Shen, Jie Li, Ruijia Wang, Deyu Wang, Li-Rong Zheng, Zhuo Zou, Jiawei Xu
publish: IEEE Journal on Emerging and Selected Topics in Circuits and Systems
abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) demonstrate significant potential for energy-efficient neuromorphic computing, while trace-based spike-timing dependent plasticity (trace-STDP) serves as a biologically inspired learning rule to improve SNN temporal learning. Memristor-based implementations of trace-STDP SNN leverage device non-linearity to emulate synaptic dynamics, enabling highly energy-efficient computation. However, the mapping from trace-STDP to memristor arrays introduces inherent variations, which significantly degrade network accuracy, posing a critical challenge for the reliable deployment of memristor-based neuromorphic systems. To address this issue, efficient variation-tolerant strategies are essential. However, current approaches do not take the trace-STDP SNN characteristics into consideration, thereby limiting their algorithm-and hardware-level effectiveness. In this work, a variation-aware online learning framework for memristor-based trace-STDP SNN is proposed, with hierarchical simulations integrated across software, ASIC, memristor-array, and memristor-device levels. Through variation analysis experiments, it is observed that variations in near-zero trace values significantly impact network accuracy. To mitigate these effects, a tailored variation-tolerant strategy is developed, together with a configurable hardware clipping unit and an ASIC/memristor co-simulator. The proposed variation-tolerant design achieves up to a 16.97% accuracy improvement, with only a 0.02% extra power overhead and a 0.01% extra area overhead, while a parallel design ensures no additional latency overhead. Integrating the co-simulator into the proposed framework facilitates design space exploration, enhancing the robustness and efficiency of memristor-based neuromorphic computing.
title_zh: 面向忆阻器基迹-STDP脉冲神经网络的容变电路设计与在线学习框架
abstract_zh: 脉冲神经网络（SNN）在节能型神经形态计算中展现出巨大潜力，而基于轨迹的脉冲时序依赖可塑性（trace-STDP）作为一种受生物启发的学习规则，能够提升SNN的时间学习能力。基于忆阻器的trace-STDP SNN利用器件的非线性特性来模拟突触动力学，从而实现高能效计算。然而，将trace-STDP映射到忆阻器阵列时会引入固有的器件变异，显著降低网络精度，这对基于忆阻器的神经形态系统的可靠部署构成了关键挑战。因此，亟需高效的抗变异策略。然而，现有方法未充分考虑trace-STDP SNN的特性，限制了其在算法与硬件层面的有效性。本文提出了一种面向忆阻器基trace-STDP SNN的变异感知在线学习框架，并在软件、专用集成电路（ASIC）、忆阻器阵列和忆阻器器件四个层级上集成了分层仿真。通过变异分析实验发现，接近零的轨迹值变异对网络精度影响显著。为缓解此类影响，本文设计了定制化的抗变异策略，结合可配置的硬件裁剪单元以及ASIC/忆阻器协同仿真器。所提出的抗变异设计最高可实现16.97%的精度提升，仅引入0.02%的额外功耗和0.01%的额外面积开销，且通过并行设计确保无额外延迟开销。将协同仿真器集成至所提框架中，有助于设计空间探索，从而增强基于忆阻器的神经形态计算系统的鲁棒性与效率。

title: Leveraging Large Language Models for Secure Hardware Verification and Analysis
authors: Yifang Zhao, Weimin Fu, Yi-Xiang Hu, Shijie Li, Xiaolong Guo, Yier Jin
publish: 2025 Asian Hardware Oriented Security and Trust Symposium (AsianHOST)
abstract: The increasing complexity of modern system-on-chip development and its distributed design workflows introduces significant security challenges. However, traditional verification techniques face limitations in scalability and automation. Recent advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs) offer promising opportunities for automating hardware security verification. This paper presents a comprehensive survey of emerging research that applies LLMs to secure hardware design analysis. Through objective evaluation, we find that current LLM-driven approaches are often developed under overly simplified scenarios and demonstrate unstable performance across diverse hardware designs. To address these issues, we outline three key directions for future research: developing standardized security-oriented benchmarks, advancing domain-specific semantic reasoning capabilities, and facilitating tighter integration with verification tools. This study provides essential insights for building scalable and fully automated LLM-driven hardware security verification.
title_zh: 利用大语言模型进行安全硬件验证与分析
abstract_zh: 现代片上系统（SoC）开发的复杂性日益增加，加之其分布式设计流程，带来了严峻的安全挑战。然而，传统验证技术在可扩展性和自动化方面存在局限性。近年来，大语言模型（LLM）的进展为硬件安全验证的自动化提供了新的机遇。本文全面综述了将大语言模型应用于安全硬件设计分析的新兴研究。通过客观评估，我们发现当前基于大语言模型的方法通常在过度简化的场景下开发，且在不同硬件设计中表现出不稳定的性能。为解决这些问题，本文提出了未来研究的三个关键方向：建立面向安全的标准基准测试集、提升面向硬件领域的语义推理能力，以及促进与验证工具的深度集成。本研究为构建可扩展且完全自动化的基于大语言模型的硬件安全验证体系提供了重要指导。

title: Modeling Fault Propagation for Model-Based Diagnosis as a MaxSAT Problem
authors: Huisi Zhou, Ning Kang, Wei Hu
publish: 2025 Asian Hardware Oriented Security and Trust Symposium (AsianHOST)
abstract: Model-Based Diagnosis (MBD), a prominent technique for identifying the causes of system malfunctions, is an important research area in reliability engineering. Existing MBD methods generate a large number of candidate diagnoses for fault localization, which requires extensive computational cost. This work introduces a novel fault propagation model to replace the model used in conventional MBD approaches, and proposes a novel diagnosis method upon this model to improve diagnosis performance. First, we generate fault propagation constraints to capture the logical relationships as faults propagate between two connected components, which can be used to narrow down some subsets of candidate diagnoses in the subsequent diagnosis phase. Second, we formally model fault propagation through Weighted Conjunctive Normal Form (WCNF), encoding it as a Maximum Satisfiability (MaxSAT) problem. Building on this model, we use RC2-an efficient MaxSAT solver-to compute only a subset of candidate diagnoses, thereby significantly reducing the computational cost of fault localization. Experimental evaluations using ISCAS-85 and ITC-99 benchmarks demonstrate that FPMBD achieves a reduction in the number of diagnoses typically ranging from 1 to 5 orders of magnitude, along with a reduction in diagnosis time ranging from 1 to 4 orders of magnitude in almost all of the test cases, compared to state-of-theart algorithms, including CMMO, HSD, One-SAT, and DiagDO.
title_zh: 将基于模型诊断中的故障传播建模为一个最大可满足性（MaxSAT）问题
abstract_zh: 基于模型的诊断（Model-Based Diagnosis, MBD）是一种用于识别系统故障原因的重要技术，是可靠性工程领域的一个关键研究方向。现有的MBD方法在故障定位过程中会产生大量候选诊断结果，导致计算开销巨大。本文提出一种新颖的故障传播模型，用以替代传统MBD方法中的模型，并在此基础上构建一种新的诊断方法，以提升诊断性能。首先，我们生成故障传播约束，用以刻画故障在两个相连组件之间传播时的逻辑关系，这些约束可在后续诊断阶段有效缩小部分候选诊断子集。其次，我们采用加权合取范式（Weighted Conjunctive Normal Form, WCNF）对故障传播过程进行形式化建模，并将其编码为一个最大可满足性（MaxSAT）问题。基于该模型，我们利用RC2——一种高效的MaxSAT求解器——仅计算一部分候选诊断结果，从而显著降低故障定位的计算成本。在ISCAS-85和ITC-99基准电路上的实验评估表明，与当前最先进的算法（包括CMMO、HSD、One-SAT和DiagDO）相比，本文提出的FPMBD方法在几乎所有测试案例中，候选诊断数量减少了1到5个数量级，诊断时间减少了1到4个数量级。

title: Adversarially Evasive Hardware Trojans through Approximate Designs
authors: Marwa Dhiaf, Halima Bouzidi, Ihsen Alouani
publish: 2025 Asian Hardware Oriented Security and Trust Symposium (AsianHOST)
abstract: The risk of hardware Trojans (HTs) in integrated circuits has grown with the globalized economy and increased reliance on third-party services. To counter this threat, Machine Learning (ML)-based detectors are widely used. However, recent studies show that adversaries can exploit ML vulnerabilities to create evasive HTs. These prior approaches, however, often require high circuit overheads, limiting their practicality. In this paper, we propose a novel method to generate evasive HTs with minimal or no circuit overhead, under realistic black-box assumptions. By relaxing the requirement for strict payload correctness from the attacker’s perspective, we define a new approximate adversarial design space. Our gradient-free framework leverages approximate gate replacements and uses a multi-objective evolutionary algorithm to balance HT evasiveness and approximation error. Unlike prior work assuming white-box access to detection models, we focus on the more practical black-box scenario, aligning with real-world constraints and enabling a more robust evaluation of detection strategies. Experiments show our attack reduces Trojan detector accuracy by an average of 91.6%, while maintaining functionality with only 35% approximation error.
title_zh: 通过近似设计实现对抗性规避的硬件木马
abstract_zh: 随着经济全球化以及对第三方服务依赖的增加，集成电路中硬件木马（HTs）的风险日益上升。为应对这一威胁，基于机器学习（ML）的检测方法被广泛采用。然而，近期研究表明，攻击者可利用机器学习模型的漏洞，设计出具有规避能力的隐蔽硬件木马。但以往这些方法通常带来较高的电路开销，限制了其实际应用。本文提出一种新颖的方法，可在现实的黑盒假设下，生成几乎无需额外电路开销的规避型硬件木马。通过放宽攻击者对功能载荷精确性的严格要求，我们定义了一种新的近似对抗设计空间。所提出的无梯度框架利用近似门级替换，并采用多目标进化算法来平衡木马的规避能力与近似引入的误差。与以往假设可白盒访问检测模型的研究不同，本文聚焦于更贴近实际的黑盒场景，符合现实约束，有助于对检测策略进行更鲁棒的评估。实验结果表明，本攻击方法可使木马检测器的准确率平均下降91.6%，同时仅引入35%的近似误差，仍能保持电路的基本功能。

title: Exploring Cache Policies on FPGA-Accelerated Simulations: Tradeoffs Between Usability and Simulation Speed
authors: Soraya Mobaraki, Thierry Gil, Lionel Torres, David Novo
publish: Proceedings of the 36th International Workshop on Rapid System Prototyping
abstract: None
title_zh: 探索FPGA加速仿真中的缓存策略：可用性与仿真速度之间的权衡
abstract_zh: None
